column.name: id
column.remarks: The account id

column.name: status
column.remarks: The mrtm account status

column.name: emission_trading_scheme
column.remarks: The emission trading scheme of the mrtm account

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS account_mrtm CASCADE;

column.name: imo_number
column.remarks: The company IMO number

column.name: first_maritime_activity_date
column.remarks: First maritime activity date

column.name: sop_id
column.remarks: The sop id of the account

column.name: registry_id
column.remarks: The uk ets registry id of the account

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE account_mrtm DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS imo_number, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS address_line1, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS address_line2, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS city, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS country, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS postcode, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS state, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS first_maritime_activity_date, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS sop_id, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS registry_id

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX trgm_gin_idx_account_mrtm_imo_number ON account_mrtm USING gin (imo_number gin_trgm_ops);

column.name: closing_date
column.remarks: The closing date of the account

column.name: closed_by
column.remarks: The id of the user who closed the account

column.name: closed_by_name
column.remarks: The name of the user who closed the account

column.name: closure_reason
column.remarks: The reason why the account was closed

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE account_mrtm DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS closing_date, closed_by, closed_by_name, closure_reason;

changeSet.author: P44065

createTable.remarks: Represents an account reporting status entry

column.name: id
column.remarks: The reporting status entry id

column.name: status
column.remarks: The reporting status

column.name: reason
column.remarks: The reason for entering a new reporting status

column.name: submitter_id
column.remarks: The id of the user that submitted the reporting status entry

column.name: submitter_name
column.remarks: The full name of the user that submitted the reporting status entry

column.name: submission_date
column.remarks: The submission date and time of the reporting status entry

column.name: account_id
column.remarks: The account id to which the reporting status entry refers to

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS account_reporting_status_history CASCADE;

column.name: reporting_status
column.remarks: The reporting status of the account

rollback.sql: alter table account_mrtm drop column if exists reporting_status;

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: with list as ( select distinct on (id) id from account_mrtm order by id desc ) insert into account_reporting_status_history(id, status, reason, submitter_id, submitter_name, submission_date, account_id) select nextval('account_reporting_status_history_seq'), 'REQUIRED_TO_REPORT', '', 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM', '2024-06-29T15:30:00', l.id from list as l

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: with list as ( select distinct on (account_id) account_id, submission_date, status from account_reporting_status_history order by account_id, submission_date desc ) update account_mrtm as acc set reporting_status = l.status from list as l where acc.id = l.account_id;

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
P44065

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE account_mrtm DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_address_line1, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_address_line2, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_city, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_country, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_postcode, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS reg_state

createTable.remarks: Represents an account reporting status entry for each year

column.name: id
column.remarks: The reporting status entry id

column.name: status
column.remarks: The reporting status

column.name: year
column.remarks: The reporting status year

column.name: reason
column.remarks: The reason for entering a new reporting status

column.name: last_update
column.remarks: The latest status update date and time of the reporting status entry

column.name: account_id
column.remarks: The account id to which the reporting status entry refers to

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS account_reporting_status CASCADE;

column.name: account_reporting_status_id
column.remarks: The account status report of a specific year

rollback.sql: alter table account_reporting_status_history drop column if exists account_reporting_status_id;

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status ADD CONSTRAINT account_reporting_status_uc UNIQUE (account_id, year);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS account_reporting_status_uc;

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: WITH inserted_rows AS ( INSERT INTO account_reporting_status (id, status, year, reason, last_update, account_id) SELECT nextval('account_reporting_status_seq'), t1.status, 2025 AS year, t1.reason, t1.submission_date AS last_update, t1.account_id FROM account_reporting_status_history t1 JOIN ( SELECT account_id, MAX(submission_date) AS latest_submission FROM account_reporting_status_history GROUP BY account_id ) t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.submission_date = t2.latest_submission ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id, account_id ) UPDATE account_reporting_status_history SET account_reporting_status_id = inserted_rows.id FROM inserted_rows WHERE account_reporting_status_history.account_id = inserted_rows.account_id AND account_reporting_status_id IS NULL;

rollback.sql: update account_reporting_status_history set account_reporting_status_id = null; delete FROM public.account_reporting_status

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE account_mrtm DROP COLUMN reporting_status CASCADE;

column.name: reporting_status
column.remarks: The reporting status of the account

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status ALTER COLUMN reason SET DATA TYPE VARCHAR(10000); ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status_history ALTER COLUMN reason SET DATA TYPE VARCHAR(10000);
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status ALTER COLUMN reason SET DATA TYPE VARCHAR(2000); ALTER TABLE account_reporting_status_history ALTER COLUMN reason SET DATA TYPE VARCHAR(2000);

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: update account_mrtm set registry_id = null; ALTER TABLE account_mrtm ADD CONSTRAINT registry_id_uc UNIQUE (registry_id);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE account_mrtm DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS registry_id_uc;

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE public.account_mrtm ADD CONSTRAINT registry_id_size_chk CHECK (registry_id BETWEEN 1000000 AND 9999999);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE public.account_mrtm DROP CONSTRAINT registry_id_size_chk;

column.name: account_id
column.remarks: The account id to which the reporting status entry refers to
